title: echinolobium fruticosum
intro: Echinolobium fruticosum, also known as the prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Echinolobium fruticosum include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to treat various health conditions.
